name: Pasta Dough (Manual Pasta Machines Only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 cups of flour and salt in a bowl, reserving 1/3 cup for later.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Mix eggs, olive oil, and water and pour into the well.
4. Stir the flour into the egg mixture until dough forms into a ball.
5. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead for about 10 minutes,
adding extra flour if too moist.
6. Knead until dough is smooth and elastic.
7. Cover with a towel and rest for 30 minutes.
8. Cut into 4 portions, keeping pieces covered until used.
9. Set machine dial to the widest setting (1 on the Atlas).
10. Flatten dough ball and run through rollers several times
until smooth (add flour if needed).
11. Move rollers to the next setting and roll again once.
12. Continue rolling until pasta is the proper thickness (5 or 6 on the Atlas).
13. If too long, cut sheet in half.
14. Continue with other pieces and then put finished sheets aside
to dry for about 3 minutes.
15. Attach desired pasta cutters and run sheets through.
16. Use right away or spread out the pasta to dry overnight and then freeze extra.
17. To cook, drop into a large pot of boiling water with a bit of salt and oil.
18. Cook until al dente, which should only take about 2 minutes for fresh.
19. Tip: Ensure dough is fairly dry; otherwise it won't cut into separate strands.
20. Another tip: Substitute heavy cream for the 1/3 cup water
for richer pasta (great for fettuccine alfredo).
